Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion For Order Stiking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Vincent Frias for Defendant and Opposing Party.

Hearing held and Plaintiff People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
